result.stdout:
The argument 'SmtpServer' is required if the following argument(s) are not specified: Help

Pick your secret santa without needing everyone in the office

Usage - SecretSanta -options

GlobalOption        Description
Help (-h)           Displays the help information
SmtpServer (-s)     The address of the SMTP server with optional port (e.g.
                    smtp.mailtrap.io:465), default port is 465
SmtpUsername (-u)   User for the SMTP server
SmtpPassword (-p)   Password for the SMTP server
FromAddress (-f)    The email address of the sender
InputPath (-i)      Path to the input CSV file containing participants and
                    their email addresses
MessagePath (-m)    Path to the message HTML file
